Notes: Single UPDATE packet intentionally mixes add/delete on the same owner name to probe whether the server evaluates the Update Section strictly in wire order or normalizes it as an unordered set of actions.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing A RR for w.campus.edu., then add a CNAME at the same owner name in the same UPDATE. A sequential processor can end with a valid CNAME-only node; a set-normalizing processor may reject the packet or preserve a different final state.

Steps.Name: w.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME was installed.

Steps.Name: w.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the old A RR remains or was removed.
